title: Mezia peruviana
taxonomy: Mezia peruviana is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Mezia, which is a group of orchids. This genus is part of the subfamily Vanilloideae, a subfamily of orchids known for their unique characteristics. Further classification places Mezia peruviana within the tribe Vanilleae, a tribe of orchids that are primarily found in the tropical regions of the Americas. Mezia peruviana is also known to be a part of the subtribe Pseudovanilleinae, which is a subtribe within the tribe Vanilleae.
